data.body: Added the rebuildables exclusion: provision-restore.md now documents index/ (Lucene, reindexable via gerrit.war reindex) and cache/ (H2, regenerated) as REBUILDABLE — excluded from the logical restore archive (tar --exclude=index --exclude=cache git db etc logs) and discarded+reindexed after a whole-volume snapshot restore. git/db/etc are the preserved source of truth.
